sourceMovie.title: Nude
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Nude (2017) stuck because it commits to its documentary premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Tony Sacco's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Nude clicked for you, Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return (2022) is a strong next stop: both trade in documentary, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Nude?
faq.answer: Try Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return, Hot Girls Wanted, Game of Thrones: The Last Watch—each shares DNA with Nude while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Nude?
faq.answer: Nude (2017) is best described as Documentary. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Nude worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 9.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this documentary lane.
